name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan introduces a fundamentally different approach to target definition (V_score vs. is_robust), feature selection (RFE/VIF vs. manual), and model training (SMOTE/LOGO vs. class weights/LOCO). Because the core methodology and target variable have changed, the previous data processing and model training steps are no longer applicable. Therefore, the entire workflow must be restarted from the beginning.
